Uses of Interface
eds.framework.ISimulationEntity

Packages that use ISimulationEntity
Package
Description
eds.framework
Core simulation framework that supports the MVC model layer.
eds.model
MVC model layer of the application.

    Method
    Description
    ISimulationEntity
    ServicePoint.finishService()
    Completes service for the current simulation entity.
    ISimulationEntity
    Event.getEntity()
    Returns the simulation entity associated with this event.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void

    class
